clips.label: wry
clips.feedback: not sure what to look for
clips.agent_diagnosis: No review description was provided. Carry to sable_r2 with explicit pass/fail criteria.
clips.proposed_fix: No parameter changes. Re-render with description.

clips.label: grave
clips.feedback: not sure what to look for
clips.agent_diagnosis: No review description provided. Expression is likely too subtle — BrowLY −0.1 and MouthForm −0.5 may read as near-neutral without priming.
clips.proposed_fix: Re-render with description. If still not legible after description: increase MouthForm to −0.7, BrowLY to −0.15.

clips.label: hushed
clips.feedback: not sure what to look for
clips.agent_diagnosis: No review description provided. EyeLOpen/R 0.85 Multiply and MouthForm 0.15 may not read as distinct from neutral without priming.
clips.proposed_fix: Re-render with description. If still not legible: reduce eye Multiply to 0.8, MouthForm to 0.0.

clips.label: nod_review
clips.feedback: did not see a nod; not sure what to look for
clips.agent_diagnosis: nod_review is an internal review artifact — it holds head at pitch-down for 3.5s to let reviewer inspect breath resumption. It is NOT a discourse nod. Human was not told this.
clips.proposed_fix: No changes. Re-render with explicit description.

clips.label: look_away
clips.feedback: bad snap at the end; possibly a breath guard issue; was present in previous versions and missed
clips.agent_diagnosis: look_away.motion3.json AngleX returns from 20° to 0° linearly over 0.5s (t=1.0→1.5) — 40°/s, visually abrupt. Pre-existing defect not caught in rounds 1–3.
clips.proposed_fix: Extend duration to 2.0s so return is over 1.0s (t=1.0→2.0). Increase model3.json LookAway FadeOutTime 0.6→1.0.

clips.label: tap
clips.feedback: same snap issue as look_away at the end
clips.agent_diagnosis: tap model3.json FadeOutTime 0.5s likely insufficient for lerp guard to suppress breath phase jump at t=0.8 motion exit. Pre-existing defect.
clips.proposed_fix: Increase model3.json Tap FadeOutTime 0.5→0.8. Increase tap.motion3.json per-curve FadeOutTime 0.5→0.8.

clips.label: lean_in
clips.agent_diagnosis: Current ease-in reaches peak at t=0.8s — too fast; reads closer to a nod than a deliberate lean. Needs a more unhurried onset.
clips.proposed_fix: Extend ease-in to 1.2s, ease-out to 1.0s. New duration 3.2s: [0,0 → 1.2,−5 → 2.2,−5 → 3.2,0].

clips.label: consult
clips.feedback: snap at the end; otherwise looks reasonable
clips.agent_diagnosis: consult AngleZ returns from 12° over 0.7s (17°/s). FadeOutTime 0.6s insufficient overlap with lerp guard for smooth exit.
clips.proposed_fix: Extend duration to 2.5s so return is over 1.2s (t=1.3→2.5). Increase model3.json Consult FadeOutTime 0.6→1.0.

clips.label: glance_down
clips.agent_diagnosis: glance_down AngleY returns over only 0.35s (~11°/s). FadeOutTime 0.5s insufficient.
clips.proposed_fix: Extend duration to 1.4s so return is over 0.75s (t=0.65→1.4). Increase model3.json GlanceDown FadeOutTime 0.5→0.7.

clips.label: address
clips.feedback: not sure what to look for
clips.agent_diagnosis: No review description provided. Motion is most legible when head starts off-center; if already near-center it appears as only a chin-lift.
clips.proposed_fix: No parameter changes. Re-render with description.
